meaning: adj.无性孢子的,分生孢子的
examples: Species classification and identification in this genus has been based mostly on conidial morphology.
Comparisons of conidial size and DNA content per conidia for 'hybrids' and parental strains indicated that the 'hybrids' were diploid.
The main results are as follows:(1) Treated by ultraviolet ray and chemical mutagen, 50 isolates were obtained from isolate BC4's conidial suspension.
